author: spencer_tb
content:
🧪  `bal-devnet-4` **v5.7.0-alpha release**: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-spec-tests/releases/tag/bal@v5.7.0

PTAL at the release notes for updated spec changes and new tests. This release was more rushed than we wanted so fast feedback from clients on tests is paramount!

All tests and specs changes can be found on this EELS branch: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-specs/tree/devnets/bal/4
